body.short_description: Deploy UIAO v0.6.1 ServiceNow adapter update to production
body.description: UIAO v0.6.1 introduces write-side methods to the ServiceNow adapter. Deployment follows CM-3 change management procedures. Control: CM-3.
body.risk_impact_analysis: Risk: Minor service disruption during adapter restart window (estimated 5 minutes). Mitigation: deployment occurs during maintenance window. Rollback: redeploy previous adapter version via CI/CD pipeline. No data loss risk — adapter is stateless.
body.justification: Bring ServiceNow adapter to tier-1 conformance with full write-side method coverage per UIAO_131.

result.short_description: Deploy UIAO v0.6.1 ServiceNow adapter update to production
result.description: UIAO v0.6.1 introduces write-side methods to the ServiceNow adapter. Deployment follows CM-3 change management procedures. Control: CM-3.
result.risk_impact_analysis: Risk: Minor service disruption during adapter restart window (estimated 5 minutes). Mitigation: deployment occurs during maintenance window. Rollback: redeploy previous adapter version via CI/CD pipeline. No data loss risk — adapter is stateless.

approval_history.comments: Initial approval request submitted by UIAO automation.

result.justification: Bring ServiceNow adapter to tier-1 conformance with full write-side method coverage per UIAO_131.

expected_behavior: Adapter MUST parse result.sys_id (32-char hex) and store it as the change_request canonical identifier.
Adapter MUST map result.number to the canonical ticket_number claim (CHG-prefixed string).
Adapter MUST emit a ChangeRequest lifecycle claim citing CM-3 when uiao_control_id is CM-3.
Adapter MUST extract approval_history[0].state and surface it as a ChangeApprovalStatus claim.
Adapter MUST treat result.phase == 'requested' as AwaitingApproval lifecycle state.
Adapter MUST record risk_impact_analysis as a RiskAssessment sub-claim on the canonical change record.

primary_citation.quote: Inserts one record in the specified table.

supporting_citation.quote: Change requests are used to track, plan, and implement changes to the IT infrastructure.

provenance.sanitization: ServiceNow instance hostname replaced with uiao-dev.service-now.com. Bearer token redacted to <TOKEN>. sys_id values are deterministic synthetic 32-char hex strings. Agency code DHS is from the canonical UIAO agency list. User references replaced with synthetic identifiers.
